title: Clarify

isActionable.question: Is this actionable?
isActionable.hint: Is there something you can physically do to move this forward?
isActionable.yes: ✅ Yes, I can act on it

twoMinute.question: Will this take less than 2 minutes?
twoMinute.hint: If you can do it faster than filing it, do it now.

delegate.question: Can someone else do this?
delegate.hint: Are you the right person, or are you waiting on someone?

projectOrAction.question: Single action or multi-step project?
projectOrAction.hint: A project is anything that takes more than one action to complete.

newProject.heading: Name this project
newProject.nextActionHint: What's the very first physical action?
newProject.nextActionPlaceholder: e.g. Draft homepage copy in Notion

nonActionable.heading: What is it?
nonActionable.hint: Everything has a home. Choose the right one.

flow.twoMinuteRule: Will it take less than 2 minutes?
flow.whatIsNextAction: What is the very next action?
flow.whatIsProject: Is this part of a larger project?

coachSocratic: Consider breaking this down into smaller, defined steps.
